---
title: "Philip Felix"
subtitle: "Senior Data Scientist"
---

I'm a data scientist with 11+ years of experience turning data into business decisions across enterprise SaaS, fintech, and healthtech.

Most recently at Atlassian, I built targeting and segmentation models that drove $20M+ in bookings, and led AI adoption across a 40+ person data org. I'm strongest at the intersection of analytics, experimentation, and AI-augmented workflows.

## Featured Projects

### [Lead Scoring & Buying Group Identification](projects/lead-scoring.qmd)

A propensity model and buying group framework for B2B SaaS marketing. Built on synthetic data mirroring real GTM workflows — logistic regression for lead scoring, plus a buying group completeness framework that identifies coverage gaps and estimates enrichment pipeline value.

**Stack:** Python, Pandas, scikit-learn, Matplotlib

### [Job Title Normalizer](projects/title-normalizer.qmd)

A multi-task neural network that classifies messy CRM job titles into standardized seniority levels and job functions. Handles real-world data noise — truncation, misspellings, abbreviations, encoding artifacts — that makes rule-based approaches break. Built as the preprocessing step for contact segmentation and buying group analysis.

**Stack:** Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Pandas

### [Context Agent](projects/context-agent.qmd)

An LLM-powered data analyst that adapts its analysis to different stakeholder contexts. Built with Claude API tool use, DuckDB, and Streamlit.

**Stack:** Python, Claude API, DuckDB, Streamlit

## Get in Touch

- [GitHub](https://github.com/pfelix828)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/pfelix1)
- [Email](mailto:pfelix828@gmail.com)
